scripts.migrate: cd backend && npx ts-node -r dotenv/config seeders/migrate.ts
scripts.truncate: cd backend && npx ts-node -r dotenv/config seeders/truncate.ts
scripts.admin: cd backend && npx ts-node -r dotenv/config seeders/admin.ts
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
